title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 43-C. LOUISIANA GIVING ALL TRUE OPPORTUNITY TO RISE

(LA GATOR) SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM

§4037.1. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known as and may be cited as the "Louisiana Giving All True Opportunity to Rise (LA GATOR) Scholarship Program".

            Acts 2024, No. 1, §1, eff. July 1, 2024.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 43-C.  LOUISIANA GIVING ALL TRUE OPPORTUNITY TO RISE
(LA GATOR) SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM
§4037.1.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known as and may be cited as the "Louisiana Giving All True
Opportunity to Rise (LA GATOR) Scholarship Program".
Acts 2024, No. 1, §1, eff. July 1, 2024.
